raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Boys & Girls Club of the West Valley has been recognized as the 2024 California Nonprofit of the Year for Assembly District 46.",
    "BGCWV was founded in 1992 with a mission to provide safe, affordable, educational, and productive activities for at-risk youth during non-school hours.",
    "The organization aims to build the community’s social and economic fabric by ensuring the academic and career success of the students they serve.",
    "BGCWV has evolved from a solely on-campus organization to a deeply rooted community presence.",
    "In 2004, BGCWV established a permanent 10,000-square-foot facility in Canoga Park.",
    "BGCWV provides young people opportunities to engage in positive social activities, achieve academic success, and learn the benefits of healthy eating through various programs.",
    "Youth today are facing new challenges of mental and emotional health that are unprecedented.",
    "BGCWV serves close to 3,000 unique youth, providing access to caring mentors, advisors, and coaches.",
    "The organization aims to ensure its members graduate on time and become contributors to society."
  ]
}
```
